=== MESSAGE ===
[TIR][DEBUG][buf_lines.lua] === cache[#1] lines[1]='0'...[6]='5'
[TIR][UNDO][buf_lines.lua] nil[0->1]set_lines lines[1]='0'...[21]='20'

CASE buf_lines.get_lines(bufnr, 0, -1)

CASE clear & buf_lines.get_lines(bufnr, 9, 13)
[TIR][DEBUG][buf_lines.lua] === cache[#1] lines[7]='6'...[16]='15'

CASE buf_lines.get_line(bufnr, 7)
[TIR][DEBUG][[string ":lua"]] 6

CASE buf_lines.get_line(bufnr, 3)

CASE buf_lines.get_line(bufnr, 11)

CASE buf_lines.get_line(bufnr, 0)
